name: The Kasich Family
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
body:
Wishing you a joyous holiday season and a happy New Year!

Wishing you a joyous holiday
season and a happy New Year!

-John, Karen, Reese & Emma Kasich

"Glory to God in the highest, and
on earth peace, good will toward men." - Luke 2:14

name: The Carney Family
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
Friend,

In remembering her father Tracey summed up his life as, "be useful, be honest, and most of all, be grateful." This holiday season, we are especially grateful for the blessings of home in Delaware and for the legacies of our father, who continues to inspire us every day.

Wishing you a happy, healthy, and peaceful New Year.

John, Tracey, Sam and Jimmy Carney

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
---------------------------------------------

Friends for John Carney
P.O. Box 2162

Wilmington DE 19899 United States
